category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Git remote helper for AWS CodeCommit; AWS docs describe git-remote-codecommit as extending Git for CodeCommit repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-remote-codecommit; official AWS GitHub repository and AWS documentation use that name.
docs_sources: AWS CodeCommit User Guide provides official setup steps for git-remote-codecommit; official GitHub README links to those setup and troubleshooting docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official AWS GitHub source-control project URL; AWS announcement and official README identify github.com/aws/git-remote-codecommit as the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names AWS CodeCommit and Git remote helper; AWS docs describe pushing/pulling CodeCommit repositories using profiles, IAM users, federated access, and temporary credentials.
